allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/stats" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "BODY: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERRO: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "CONTENT-TYPE: $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERRO: $_" })
PowerShell(node -e "const { DatabaseSync } = require\('node:sqlite'\); console.log\('sqlite OK sem flag'\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing; if \($r.Content -match "guide-step"\) { "HTML atualizado OK - guia encontrado" } else { "PROBLEMA: guia nao encontrado no HTML" } } catch { "Servidor nao respondeu: $_" })
